violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels made available at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan shrouds to the w3alk-n cooler condenser unit were to have an accumulation of dust and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler under the milk shelving unit was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Each HANDWASHING SINK shall be provided with a drying provision. Paper towels provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Raw animal foods (whole shell eggs) were observed stored above beverage items in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be stored in a way to prevent contamination of ready-to-eat/drink items. (Eggs stored on the bottom shelf at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan shrouds have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food-contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency to preclude the accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
